name: io.github.parserelay/mcp
title: ParseRelay
description: Parse a document into structured, confidence-scored fields. The `scan` tool: same contract as ParseRelay's REST API and component — bring your own model, pay per scan.

environmentVariables.name: PARSERELAY_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: ParseRelay API key (prl_live_…). Required for stdio.

environmentVariables.name: PARSERELAY_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: API base URL. Defaults to https://api.parserelay.app; point at a local worker for testing.
